title: Thai Black Bean Fermented Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy fermented black bean curry dish inspired by Thai cuisine, featuring a rich and savory sauce made with fermented black beans.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add soi sauce and stir for 1 minute.
Add fermented black beans, black bean paste, and 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in 2 cups of day-old rice and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Serve with steamed vegetables or a side of pickled slaw.
